evidence: The paper explicitly utilizes the "permutation feature importance method from ranger package" rather than impurity-based methods. While the random forest models identified MAT and AI as "the most important drivers," this ranking is derived from robust permutation importance, not the Gini/MDI bias. The mechanistic conclusions about climate-driven carbon loss are further validated through linear mixed-effects models showing significant interaction terms (MAT x forest type, AI x forest type) and partial dependence analyses in supplementary figures, providing adequate corroboration.
